nasb.text: and with his right-hand finger the priest shall sprinkle some of the oil that is in his left palm seven times before the Lord.

esv.text: and shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the Lord.

cnv.text: 用右手的一個指頭把左掌中的油，在耶和華面前彈七次。

ccb.text: 用一根右手指蘸左手掌中的油，在耶和华面前弹洒七次，
